title: quality-gate step result
description: Sidecar schema for the quality-gate workflow step.

ticket.description: JIRA ticket ID as provided by the user (preserves original case)

doc_quality.description: Doc quality score (1-5) from Opus judge agent

intent_alignment.description: Intent alignment score (1-5) from Opus judge agent. Consumed by orchestrator for iteration logic.

passed.description: Whether intent_alignment >= 4 (doc_quality is informational only). Consumed by orchestrator for iteration logic.

iteration.description: Which iteration of the quality gate loop (1-based)

evidence_expected.description: Whether scope-req-audit ran and evidence-status.json was expected

evidence_warning.description: Warning message when evidence was expected but not found; null otherwise

covered.description: AC items with verified quotes in the documentation

uncovered.description: AC items not covered or with unverified quotes

coverage_check.description: Per-AC quote-based coverage verification summary (null if no AC items found)

ac_item.description: The acceptance criteria item that was missed

file.description: AsciiDoc filename where the fix should be applied

section.description: Section heading or insertion point within the file

classification.description: Present only on gaps sourced from the coverage check (judge == coverage_check)

gaps.description: Identified gaps with evidence status and recommended action. Consumed by quality gate iteration for inline fix dispatch.

doc_quality.description: Complete doc_quality judge rationale. Included verbatim in feedback brief.

intent_alignment.description: Complete intent_alignment judge rationale with per-AC coverage assessments, missing artifacts, scope analysis. Included verbatim in feedback brief.

rationales.description: Full judge rationale texts for the feedback brief
